content.en:
"This is the power of the Eternal Pillar, it's terrifying!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If the Demon Seed Abyss has always been able to mobilize the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, even if he walks out of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, he can still be invincible in the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, and no one can stop him.

"Retreat to the third line of defense!"

The Lord of the Qin River shouted.

Whew!!!!

A famous Eternal Dao Realm has retreated to the third line of defense, and Ye Tian and they also intend to introduce the Demon Seed Linyuan into the second line of defense, and then use the formation here to see if they can suppress the Demon Seed Linyuan.

Even if it can't be suppressed, if it is slightly away from the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, it may be able to weaken the connection between the Demon Seed Abyss and the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Soon.

Demon Seed Lin Yuan once again mobilized the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar and struck a blow at one of Ye Tian's replica bodies.

Even if Ye Tian urged the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, the Ruin Sun Immortal Cover, he still couldn't stop it, and was broken by the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, the entire body was knocked away, and the body began to crack, although the body was stabilized, it was already a heavily injured body.

On the other side, the Qin River Lord's injuries had not yet recovered and he was unable to participate in the battle.

If they continued like this, the other two half-step Eternal Realm God Realms would also be unable to stop them, and then they would be completely defeated.

"I'll go to the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss to see if there is a way to break the connection between the Demon Seed Abyss and the Eternal Demon Pillar. Ye Tian said.

The Lord of Qinhe felt that this method was not very good, but now he could only give it a try.

"Be careful!"

The Lord of Qin River said.

Immediately, Ye Tian's other copy body reappeared and entered the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss from another direction.

......

Demon Seed No. 1 Abyss.

Ye Tian shuttled quickly along the way, not fighting other demon seeds at all, even if there were demon seeds blocking him, he would only repel the other party.

There is only one place for him, and that is the Eternal Pillar.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and he came to the Eternal Demon Pillar after a while.

In the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, no Eternal Dao Realm dared to come here in the past, even if the Demon Seed Lin Yuan was not here, they did not dare to approach the Eternal Demon Pillar, otherwise the Eternal Dao Seed would be transformed into a demon seed under the influence of the Eternal Demon Pillar, thus becoming a demon seed.

Ye Tian was close to the Eternal Demon Pillar, and the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar was affecting his Eternal Demon Seed, but no matter how it was affected, it could not make him transform into a Demon Seed.

"What a terrifying Eternal Demon Pillar, the energy contained in this is too terrifying, far beyond our Eternal Dao Realm. Even the Evil Vines are far inferior to the Eternal Demon Pillar'.!" Ye Tian muttered.

He was a little curious, such an Eternal Demon Pillar stood here, even if the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom couldn't take it away, why didn't those powerful Eternal Realm God Realms in the Eternal Kingdom Realm come and take it?

The Pillar of Eternity is definitely a good thing!

Or is it that even the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm can't withstand the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and it is still possible that the Demon Seed may be transformed, or affect the Eternal Dao Seed, causing some damage?

However, Ye Tian didn't think about this, he just wanted to break the connection between the Demon Seed Abyss and the Eternal Demon Pillar now.

"Attack and try!"

Ye Tian bombarded the Eternal Demon Pillar with all his might.

However.

Boom!

The Eternal Demon Pillar did not move at all, but instead sent a counterattack force that directly shook him away.

"Sure enough, the Eternal Demon Pillar is impossible to destroy, if it can be destroyed, the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods will definitely do it himself!"

Ye Tian immediately stood in front of the Eternal Demon Pillar, thinking carefully about what he should do.

Thinking about it, there seems to be only one way.

"I'll also try refining the Eternal Demon Pillar!"

Ye Tian used his Eternal Dao power to invade the Eternal Demon Pillar, thereby refining the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed Power gradually wrapped up, refining the Eternal Demon Pillar little by little.

At this time, the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar was also constantly influencing Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed.

Ye Tian found that his Eternal Dao Seed was also improving, although the improvement was not high, but it was indeed improving.

You know, he hasn't refined and controlled the Eternal Demon Pillar yet!

"If I can control the Eternal Demon Pillar, my Eternal Dao Seed will definitely advance by leaps and bounds!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

But if you want to control the Eternal Demon Pillar, it is definitely not so easy, even the Demon Seed is in the abyss, staying here for endless years, and has not completely controlled the Eternal Demon Pillar.

If the Demon Seed Lin Yuan controlled the Eternal Demon Pillar, he would have run around with the Eternal Demon Pillar a long time ago.

During the refining process, Ye Tian obviously sensed the terrifying origin inside the Eternal Demon Pillar, this origin was too majestic, he wanted to refine, and he couldn't do it for an endless long time.

But.

He doesn't need to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar now, he only needs to find the mark of the demon seed Lin Yuan inside the Eternal Demon Pillar, and he only needs to destroy the mark, and he should be able to cut off the connection between the other party and the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Time passed, and his other replica body was hit hard again.

Suffice it to say, they can't hold out for long.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed it.

"That familiar breath is the breath of the demon seed abyss!!!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently.

The power of his burning Eternal Dao Seed is to destroy this replica body, and he must also destroy the mark.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the Eternal Dao Seed condensed into one point, bombarding the mark of the Demon Seed Lin Yuan inside the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Click!

That mark was attacked by the power of the Eternal Dao Seed and began to crack, which would undoubtedly affect the connection between the Demon Seed Abyss and the Eternal Demon Pillar.

......

Outside the abyss of the No. 1 Demon Seed, between the first line of defense and the second line of defense.

Demon Seed Linyuan suddenly stopped attacking Ye Tian and them, but turned around and left, returning to the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and it was very urgent, it seemed that something important had happened inside the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

After the Demon Seed Lin Yuan left, many Eternal Dao Realms breathed a sigh of relief.

The Lord of the Qin River came over, "Lord Ye Tian, did you successfully destroy the connection between the Demon Seed Linyuan and the Eternal Demon Pillar?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"How did you do that?" the Qin River Lord wondered.

Ye Tian explained: "I sacrificed that clone, burned all my power, infiltrated into the Eternal Demon Pillar, and destroyed the mark left by the Demon Seed Lin Yuan inside the Eternal Demon Pillar. Demon Seed Lin Yuan did not completely control the Eternal Demon Pillar, it was only a preliminary refining, so it could destroy the connection. "

"I see, this time it's really thanks to you, Lord Ye Tianguo!"

The Lord of Qinhe said with emotion.

If it weren't for the fact that Ye Tianguo Lord had such a powerful clone, it would really be impossible to destroy the connection between the Demon Seed Abyss and the Eternal Demon Pillar, and it would be impossible to sacrifice himself if he was replaced by other half-step realm god realm powerhouses!.
